name: consumption trace: §2.18 says C-3 manifest carries standards_state, pr_corpus_state, compliance_state symmetrically -- trace can populate all three blocks in one call
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/provenance && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/consumption-trace.sh" --commit-sha abc --consulted-standards google-tsguide --consulted-pr-corpus stripe-node --consulted-compliance soc2-tsc --emit "$PWD/.claude-tdd-pro/provenance/abc.json" && grep "standards_state" .claude-tdd-pro/provenance/abc.json 1>&2 && grep "pr_corpus_state" .claude-tdd-pro/provenance/abc.json 1>&2 && grep "compliance_state" .claude-tdd-pro/provenance/abc.json 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
